title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device permission prompt loop persists after tapping "Don't Allow" and "Cancel" in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap the menu icon (hamburger or three-dot menu) to open the side menu
Tap 'Find My Device' from the menu
When the location permission prompt appears, tap 'Don't Allow'
When the secondary permission prompt appears, tap 'Cancel'
Observe that the app navigates back to the Poly Lens Menu
Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app
expected: After tapping 'Don't Allow' and then 'Cancel', the app should remember the user's choice and not repeatedly prompt for location permission when re-opening Find My Device, even after app restart.
